items.headline: Ceddanne Rafaela's tie-breaking two-run single helps Red Sox to 8-6 Patriots' Day win over Tigers
items.description: — Pinch hitter Ceddanne Rafaela had a tiebreaking, two-run infield single in the seventh inning and the Red Sox beat the Detroit Tigers 8-6 on Monday in Boston’s annual Patriots’ Day game to salvage a split of their four-game series.

items.headline: Tilak Varma rides 45-ball rollercoaster to IPL glory
items.description: From 19 off 22 balls to equalling the record for MI's fastest century, this was one wild ride

items.headline: Women's Tour de France to include London team trial in 2027
items.description: The 2027 women's Tour de France will debut a team's time trial on the streets of London.

items.headline: Vissel Kobe fall short again as Al Ahli close in on AFC Champions League Elite title defence
items.description: Al Ahli are through to a second consecutive AFC Champions League Elite final after coming from behind to beat Vissel Kobe 2-1.

items.headline: Philadelphia offering free trains at end of World Cup games
items.description: Philadelphia will offer free train travel to fans leaving World Cup matches this summer, the local organizing committee has confirmed.

items.headline: Sixes vs stability: SRH and DC brace for another run-fest in Hyderabad
items.description: Both teams are neck-and-neck on the points table, but their top-order approaches couldn't be more different this season

items.headline: Betting tips, DFS picks for Monday's three NBA playoff games
items.description: Andre Snellings breaks down Monday's three NBA playoff games and offers his favorite bets and DFS plays.

items.headline: Bayern deserve to be celebrated after Bundesliga title win
items.description: Bayern Munich successfully defended their Bundesliga crown thanks to a merciless attack and impressive solidarity.

items.headline: Sources: Odell Beckham Jr. works out for Giants, takes physical
items.description: The Giants had free agent wide receiver Odell Beckham Jr. in for a workout and physical with the team Monday, sources told ESPN.

items.headline: Fantasy baseball news: Minnesota gets some bad news
items.description: All of the important fantasy spin and actionable takeaways resulting from the latest baseball news.

items.headline: NFL fifth-year option tracker: 2023 first-round draft class
items.description: The deadline for teams to pick up the fifth-year option on rookie contracts is May 1. Which players have had their options picked up?

items.headline: Colts' Alec Pierce missing offseason workouts after ankle surgery
items.description: Colts WR Alec Pierce recently underwent surgery after playing through nagging ankle pain for much of last season and will be sidelined during offseason workouts.

items.headline: Tilak ends MI's losing streak with 45-ball century
items.description: It was the joint-quickest hundred by an MI batter, equalling Sanath Jayasuriya's effort from 2008

items.headline: Twins place Mick Abel on 15-day IL with elbow inflammation
items.description: The Twins placed right-hander Mick Abel on the 15-day IL with right elbow inflammation.

items.headline: Sabres took in special win, now turn the page
items.description: The Sabres reveled in their special playoff win, but they know it's time to turn the page to Game 2.
